claude_cli.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools Read,Grep,Glob --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit --output-format json

findings.title: S12 marked production_ready but closeout evidence directory is absent
findings.summary: Claude observed the expected mid-closeout state where the S12 closeout evidence bundle had not yet been created. The bundle now exists and is validated by the RP00 closeout gate.

findings.title: S12 README prose only partially guarded against drift
findings.summary: Optional README prose guard expansion is deferred. The S12 export names, policy, service, fixture, tests, contract definition, and live validator behavior remain hard-guarded.

required_followups: Continue with RP00.P02.M03.S13 Validation error mapping as the next subphase.
review_notes: Claude confirmed the S12 metadata-only persistence boundary logic, validators, fixture parity, fail-closed claim handling, and weighted-ledger successor behavior.
S12 does not complete RP00.P02.M03 and hands off to RP00.P02.M03.S13.
The only P2 was expected closeout sequencing and is resolved by this evidence bundle.
parsed_review.summary: Claude reported PASS / GO with one P2 closeout-evidence sequencing finding and one P3 optional README prose guard suggestion. After adjudication S12 is PASS_WITH_FINDINGS / GO with no unresolved P0/P1/P2.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned PASS / GO with one P2 expected closeout evidence finding and one P3 optional README prose guard suggestion.
